conservative.name: Retroactive Illusion
conservative.requirements:
6 power
all elements of your illusion must be within medium range

success.description: The object or character the target attempted to interact with is simply not there - the real character or object (if it ever existed at all) has been nearby and invisible the whole time; it now becomes visible
As above, but the object or character has been disguised as a different object or character nearby; the two items have exchanged places

boon.description: Add or remove 1 recharge token from one of your Grey Order spells

bane.description: You fooled your allies, too! Increase party tension by 1
